label: Ably Realtime for Next.js
summary: Use when a Next.js App Router project needs authenticated Ably realtime messaging from browser components, including pub/sub, presence, notifications, chat, or collaborative updates. Provides a server token-auth route plus a browser-side singleton Realtime client and optional provider wiring.

envVars.purpose: Server-only Ably API key used by the Next.js auth route to create token requests for browser clients. Get it from the Ably dashboard for the target app; do not expose it with NEXT_PUBLIC_.

notes: Keep the API key server-only. The auth route returns 503 when ABLY_API_KEY is missing, so the integration degrades at feature runtime rather than build time. lastVerified carries the legacy source's verification date until the first preview/generate-test selects this dossier (same no-false-green rule as PR #422).
